question: Does/ did your spouse/ partner supervise other employees? (Please tick one box only.)

content.-4: NAP (Code -4 or 3 in SPWORK; SR, US: Code -4, 2, 3 in SPWORK)

CH.2: Self-employed without employees are coded to code 2 (no supervision)

DK.1: Spouses/partners working self-employed with employees were not asked about their supervising function, encoded to code 1
